headline: Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE:BBY): A Classic Value Play with a Margin of Safety
summary: Best Buy (BBY) scores 7/10 on valuation and profitability, making it a compelling value stock. With a low P/E of 11.55, strong ROE, and expected earnings growth, it offers a classic margin of safety for patient investors.
